quoteFirst: The lifeboat then rowed towards the ship, and this apparently annoyed the Hun, who now began semaphoring the boats; but at
quoteLast: the submarine was only 50 yards off, and was bearing one point before the beam, so all _Pargust’s_ guns were able to bear nicely.
title: Q-Ships and Their Story
author: Chatterton, E. Keble (Edward Keble), 1878-1944
